t.t-if: o.partner_id.street or o.partner_id.street2 or o.partner_id.city or o.partner_id.state_id or o.partner_id.zip or o.partner_id.country_id

div.class: col-6 my-3 border-bottom border-right px-2 ks_invoice

div.t-if: o.picking_type_id.code != 'internal' and (not o.move_ids_without_package or not o.move_ids_without_package[0].partner_id) and o.picking_type_id.warehouse_id.partner_id

t.t-value: any(move_line.product_id and move_line.product_id.sudo().barcode or move_line.package_id for move_line in o.move_line_ids)
any(move_line.lot_id or move_line.lot_name for move_line in o.move_line_ids)

table.t-if: o.package_level_ids and o.picking_type_entire_packs and o.state in ['assigned', 'done']

t.t-value: o.move_lines.filtered(lambda x: x.product_uom_qty != x.reserved_availability and x.move_line_ids and x.state!='done')

div.p: All products could not be reserved. Click on the "Check Availability" button to try to reserve products.

t.t-if: not o or not 'company_id' in o
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.city or o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.street2 or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.city or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
o.company_id.state_id or o.company_id.zip or o.company_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
